name: GameNative
description: Native PC gaming with Steam, Epic, GOG and Amazon integrations on Android
readme_summary: GameNative enables Android users to play PC games from Steam, Epic Games, and GOG directly on their mobile devices. It integrates with these platforms to allow installation and playing of owned games, with support for cloud saves and automatic game image fetching.
key_features: Automatic game image fetching (via SteamGridDB API Key)
primary_use_case: Playing PC games on an Android device.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a powerful Android smartphone acting as a portal. Through the screen of the phone, a detailed PC game world is visible, with characters and environments spilling out slightly. On the phone's surface, subtle icons representing Steam, Epic Games, and GOG are integrated. A glowing, ethereal connection links the phone to a distant, stylized PC tower. The overall mood is one of seamless integration and expanded gaming possibilities, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The 'GameNative' logo is subtly placed on the phone's casing. The style should be 3D isometric illustration with bright, engaging colors and clear visual metaphors.

name: AIPex
description: AIPex: AI browser automation assistant, no migration and privacy first. Alternative to Manus Browser Operator、 Claude Chrome and Agent Browser
readme_summary: AIPex is an open-source browser extension that enables AI-powered automation directly within your existing browser, offering a privacy-first solution without requiring migration to a new browser or workflow. It integrates with AI coding agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for enhanced browser control.
key_features: Zero Migration: Operates within your current browser.
Open Source: MIT licensed, transparent, auditable, and extensible.
Privacy First: Data stays local, supports Bring Your Own Key (BYOK).
AI Browser Automation: Automates tasks using natural language.
MCP Integration: Connects with AI coding agents for browser control.
primary_use_case: To provide a privacy-focused, integrated AI-powered automation solution for web browsing tasks directly within the user's existing browser, and to enable AI coding agents to control browser actions.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration of a friendly, glowing digital assistant seamlessly integrated into the interface of a standard web browser window. The assistant is shown as a helpful guide, with one hand pointing to a complex web page and the other hand manipulating abstract data streams that flow from the browser. Subtle visual cues like glowing lines connecting the assistant to browser elements and small, abstract representations of code or data visualizations floating around indicate automation. The background is clean and modern, emphasizing the browser as the primary workspace. The overall mood is one of effortless control and enhanced productivity, with the repository name 'AIPex' subtly integrated into the browser's UI. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a soft, digital glow and a focus on clarity and intuitive design.

name: DebugSwift
description: A toolkit to make debugging iOS applications easier 🚀
readme_summary: DebugSwift is a comprehensive toolkit for iOS developers, offering a suite of tools to enhance the debugging process. It provides features for network inspection, performance monitoring, app diagnostics, and interface analysis, all accessible within the application itself.
key_features: Performance Monitoring (CPU, memory, FPS, leak detection)
App Tools (Crash reports, console logs, device info)
Interface Tools (Grid overlay, view hierarchy, animation control)
primary_use_case: To provide iOS developers with an integrated, in-app toolkit for real-time debugging, performance analysis, and interface inspection, simplifying the development and troubleshooting workflow.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, representing 'DebugSwift', meticulously examining a complex, glowing clockwork mechanism (representing an iOS app). The artisan uses specialized tools like magnifying glasses and digital scanners to pinpoint tiny imperfections and inefficiencies within the gears and springs. Small, holographic displays around the scene show real-time data streams, network requests, and performance metrics. The overall mood is one of focused discovery and problem-solving, set against a clean, modern workshop backdrop. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, yet clear color palette, emphasizing the intricate details of the clockwork and the artisan's tools.

name: Personal_AI_Infrastructure
description: Agentic AI Infrastructure for magnifying HUMAN capabilities.
readme_summary: Personal AI Infrastructure (PAI) is a framework designed to augment human capabilities by providing an agentic AI system. It aims to act as a 'Life Operating System,' integrating AI to magnify personal productivity and effectiveness.
primary_use_case: To serve as a foundational infrastructure for building and deploying agentic AI systems that enhance individual human productivity and capabilities, acting as a personalized digital operating system.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ethereal conductor standing at a podium, orchestrating a symphony of diverse digital tools and information streams. The conductor's baton, glowing with soft light, directs streams of data (represented as musical notes and flowing light) from various sources (like books, screens, and abstract data clouds) into a cohesive, harmonious output that manifests as a radiant, expanding aura of enhanced human potential around a silhouette of a person. Subtle UI elements and code snippets are woven into the background, hinting at the underlying infrastructure. The scene is set in a futuristic, minimalist library with soft, ambient lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant, yet harmonious color palette.
